name: Parve Schmaltz
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Carrots (3 cups/500 g); washed; coarsely-grated
1 1/2 pt Peanut or Sesame Oil (3 cups/750 ml)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a deep pot.
2. Heat gently and cook on low heat until the onions are golden brown.
3. Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve to remove solids, then keep refrigerated.
Sometimes grated apple (about 350g/12 oz) is included.
